title: rubus horripilus var. horricomus
intro: Rubus horripilus var. horricomus, also known as the thorny bramble, is a variant of the rubus horripilus plant, a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus horripilus var. horricomus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Rubus horripilus var. horricomus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, from skin conditions to digestive issues.
